metadata.title: OMA Digital — Websites, Apps & AI Automation in Senegal and Campbell River

hero.title: Automate your business
hero.subtitle: Premium websites, mobile apps and AI automation solutions to propel your Senegalese business towards digital success.
hero.urgency: Limited free audit slots available this week

problemSolution.p1Desc: You spend hours on repetitive tasks that could be automated.
problemSolution.p2Desc: Your business is invisible online, you miss potential clients every day.
problemSolution.p3Desc: Your competitors move forward with technology while you fall behind.
problemSolution.s1Desc: AI handles your repetitive tasks — you focus on growth.
problemSolution.s2Desc: A premium website and apps that convert visitors into clients.
problemSolution.s3Desc: Stay ahead with cutting-edge technology solutions.

services.sectionSubtitle: Complete digital solutions to transform your business.
services.websiteDesc: Showcase sites, e-commerce and modern web apps, fast and SEO-optimized.
services.mobileDesc: Custom iOS and Android apps to connect your business with clients everywhere.
services.aiDesc: Smart chatbots, workflow automation and AI solutions for your productivity.

caseStudies.sectionSubtitle: See how we've transformed Senegalese businesses.
caseStudies.challenge1: Physical store in Saly without online presence, losing sales to digital competition.
caseStudies.solution1: Full e-commerce site with Wave/Orange Money payment, AI chatbot and automation.
caseStudies.challenge2: Manual appointment management causing errors and patient losses.
caseStudies.solution2: Mobile appointment booking app with automatic reminders.
caseStudies.challenge3: Entirely manual export process with paper-based order tracking.
caseStudies.solution3: Full AI automation: custom CRM, real-time tracking, automated reports.

testimonials.quote1: We needed a clear platform to structure our activities in legal consulting, taxation and recruitment. The website improves the readability of our offer and facilitates contact, both for companies and candidates. We see better quality incoming requests. A rigorous approach, aligned with our professional standards.
testimonials.quote2: We wanted a digital presence that matched the quality of our creations, from ready-to-wear to bespoke. The site showcases our collections and reinforces the premium perception of the brand. We now receive more qualified requests, especially for bespoke orders. A refined execution perfectly aligned with our positioning.
testimonials.quote3: We needed a website capable of showcasing our dairy products and structuring our online presence. The result highlights our range and builds trust with our clients and distributors. We see better visibility and more targeted inquiries. An efficient, results-oriented collaboration.

pricing.sectionSubtitle: Plans adapted to every business. All prices in FCFA.
pricing.pageSubtitle: Choose the plan that matches your ambitions.

process.sectionSubtitle: A simple and transparent process from idea to launch.
process.step1Desc: We review your current situation and goals in 30 minutes.
process.step2Desc: We recommend a solution that fits your budget and needs.
process.step3Desc: Our team builds your solution with regular progress updates.
process.step4Desc: We deploy, train your team and support you after delivery.
process.g3: Source code delivered with the project
